title: microbriza poimorpha
intro: Microbriza poimorpha, also known as False Manna Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microbriza poimorpha include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
